### Post by pcfan1234 on 2019-09-13
Please post the outputs of the wireless script, we need more information about your hardware.

### Post by bosstiat on 2019-09-13
I have similar issues [https://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=2426660](https://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=2426660) . I think the kernel got updated to 5.0.27 in the last software patch. Unfortunately for us with this set of wifi drivers breaks in the dkms make or something.

---

### Post by jeremy31 on 2019-09-13
> **bosstiat said:**
> I have similar issues [https://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=2426660](https://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=2426660) . I think the kernel got updated to 5.0.27 in the last software patch. Unfortunately for us with this set of wifi drivers breaks in the dkms make or something.

Until we hear more from thelampguy we can't know if they have a USB device like yours or if they have a PCI device like the rtl8821ce or rtl8723de that aren't supported yet by the kernel
